meaning: adj.聪明能干的 卓有成效的
examples: The system has 16 logical CPUs with EPT support and 48GB of RAM.
When EPT was disabled performance dropped by approximately 33% on the same tests.
So the EPT tradition philosophers do not need to suspect technological capabilities.
Gordon Brown, los jefes ejecutivos de los cinco organismos patrocinadores de la EPT y representantes de otras organizaciones, fundaciones y entidades del sector privado y la sociedad civil.
